query: 查询年度pH年均值最高的站点列表
attempted_sql:
SELECT station_id, monitor_year, AVG(m2_value) AS avg_ph, water_quality_level
FROM wm_waterquality_year_records
WHERE m2_value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY station_id, monitor_year, water_quality_level
ORDER BY AVG(m2_value) DESC
LIMIT 20

query: 查询年度pH年均值最高的站点列表
attempted_sql:
SELECT station_id, monitor_year, m2_value, water_quality_level
FROM wm_waterquality_year_records
WHERE m2_value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY monitor_year DESC, m2_value DESC
LIMIT 20

query: 查询年度pH年均值最高的站点列表
attempted_sql:
SELECT station_id, 
       EXTRACT(YEAR FROM monitor_time) AS monitor_year, 
       ROUND(AVG(m2_value)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ph
FROM wm_waterquality_day_records
WHERE m2_value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY station_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM monitor_time)
ORDER BY AVG(m2_value) DESC
LIMIT 20
guard_reason: 存在未知表：monitor_time；存在未知字段：extract, numeric, year
